title: Three mauves go solo: the MMM has cracked wide open
summary: Mauritius faces cost-of-living crunch as the war bites. Africa's growth forecast takes a hit from the Iran war. Airman rescued from Iran, but Tuesday's deadline could change everything.

title: The man who built the MMM just walked away from it
summary: No petrol or bread price hike yet, minister says. Africa's growth on the line as Iran war drags into its sixth week. US rescues downed airman from Iran; Tuesday is 'power plant day', Trump says.
